properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 136/14
BARENTS SEA
1. ONE SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED   FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER IN THE PERIOD FROM NOVEMBER 24TH TO DECEMBER 7TH 2014. THE LAUNCHING WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 07:00 HRS AND 13:00 HRS. LOCAL TIME WITHIN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD. 

SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS:

HAZARD AREA 1:
AN AREA DEFINED BY THE FOLLOWING:
A SECTOR WITH ORIGIN IN THE LAUNCHER COORDINATES N69-17.6 E016-01.1
TRUE BEARING: 310-014 DEGREES. SECTOR LENGTH: 8,5 NM.
  
HAZARD AREA 3: 
AN AREA DEFINED BY THE FOLLOWING:
A CIRCLE WITH ORIGO IN NOMINAL IMPACT POINT: N74-30.5 E015-40.8
RADIUS: 74,0 NM
2. CANCEL WARNING 133/14
